s0_init.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress is active with slide 5 selected in the thumbnails. The Properties sidebar is open to Slide; Layouts panel is visible with one layout tile highlighted. No text box/object is selected, so actions (e.g., changing layout, background, or master) will apply to the whole slide.

s1_after_double_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view with slide 5 selected. A text box on the slide is being edited, cursor inside a bulleted paragraph. Properties sidebar is open showing Character (Liberation Sans, 18 pt) and Paragraph/List settings for formatting.

s2_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress is open in Normal view with Slide 5 active. A bullet line in the text box is selected with the text cursor inside the paragraph. The Properties sidebar is open to Character/Lists/Paragraph (e.g., Liberation Sans, 18 pt) for formatting.

s3_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view with slide 5 active. A bulleted text box on the slide is in text-edit mode, with one bullet line selected. The Properties sidebar is open (Character, Lists, Paragraph) with list and indent controls visible for formatting.

s4_after_double_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view with slide 5 selected. A text box on the slide is active, with the cursor inside a bulleted paragraph. The Properties sidebar is open with Character (Oswald 20 pt), Lists, and Paragraph controls available for formatting.

s5_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view with slide 5 selected. A text box on the slide is in text‑edit mode with the caret in a bulleted paragraph. The Properties sidebar is open, showing Character, Lists, and Paragraph sections for formatting.

s6_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view with slide 5 active. A text box is in edit mode and a bullet line segment is selected. The Properties sidebar is open for formatting, showing Character (font and size) plus Lists/Paragraph options.

s7_after_press.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view, editing slide 5. A bullet-list text box is in Text Edit mode with a phrase selected. The Properties sidebar is open to Character/Paragraph, showing font Oswald 20 pt with formatting controls (bold/underline and spacing/indent) available.
